messages.content:
﻿
The 18th Amendment banned the production, sale, and distribution of liquor in 1919.
What amendment later repealed the 18th Amendment in 1933?
The 21st Amendment repealed the 18th Amendment in 1933.

﻿
In the "New Jersey vs. TLO" case, the Supreme Court declared that schools may do which of the following?
A. Search a student's belongings when they have probable cause and evidence.
B. Search a student's belongings after obtaining a search warrant.
C. Search a student's belongings when they have reasonable suspicion of the student's wrong doing.
C. Search a student's belongings when they have reasonable suspicion of the student's wrong doing.

﻿
Access to what had been separated by race in the Plessy v. Ferguson case?
A. Schools
B. Bathrooms
C. Railroad cars
C. Railroad cars.

﻿
Which amendments did Ernesto
Miranda claim had been violated while he was being interrogated by the police?
A. 6th and 7th Amendments
B. 5th and 6th Amendments
C. 7th and 8th Amendments
B. 5th and 6th Amendments.

﻿
Which amendment gave freed slave men the right to vote in
1870?
A. 26th Amendment
B. 19th Amendment
C. 15th Amendment
C. 15th Amendment.

﻿
What allows the presidential candidates to get their names and beliefs heard by the public?
A. Grassroots campaigning
B. General election
C. Electoral college
A. Grassroots campaigning.

﻿
Which type of public policy is the following
policy?
Declaring war on another nation.
A. Domestic Policy
B. Foreign Policy
C. Both Domestic and Foreign
D. Not A Public Policy
B. Foreign Policy.

﻿
In a "pluralist society", who knows what is best for the entire population?
A. The people
B. Special interest groups
C. The government
A. The people.

﻿
What Act allows the government to detain you if they suspect you might have ties to
terrorism?
A. the Patriot Act
B. the Palmer Act
C. the Emancipation Act
A. The Patriot Act.

﻿
How much does the naturalization process
A. $25
B. $725
C. $225
cost?
